query: Virgin Galactic (SPCE) financing, capital raise, cash position and going concern status in 2026. Has the company raised significant capital or secured funding in Q2 2026 (April-June 2026)? What is their current cash runway?
answer:
Research complete. Here's the summary of findings on Virgin Galactic (SPCE) financing and cash position:

## Key Findings

**Did SPCE raise significant capital in Q2 2026 (April–June)?**
**Yes** — Virgin Galactic raised **~$52 million in April 2026** through its at-the-market (ATM) equity program. This followed ~$11M raised via the same program in Q1 2026. This was dilutive equity sales (not a confirmed strategic-investor round — June "strategic investor" reports around the stock spike were unconfirmed by filings).

**Cash Position (as of Q1 2026, ended March 31, 2026):**
- ~$251M total liquidity ($124.8M cash/equivalents + $95.1M marketable securities)
- The ATM program has up to $300M authorized (Jefferies as agent)

**Cash Runway:**
- Burn is ~$90M/quarter (Q1 FCF −$93.3M; Q2 guidance −$87M to −$92M)
- From ~$251M + ~$52M April raise vs. ~$90M/quarter burn → runway extends roughly into **early-to-mid 2027** absent continued raises, which is why the ATM is being drawn on continually
- Management targets "modest quarterly positive cash flow within 2027"

**Going Concern:**
- **No explicit going-concern warning** in the Q1 2026 filing, but reliance on ongoing equity dilution is clear (shares roughly doubled YoY to ~79M; stock at $2.57, down ~71% from its 52-week high). Next earnings ~Aug 5, 2026.

All findings, data points, and sources have been delivered via the structured output.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic (NYSE: SPCE) narrows Q1 loss and guides 2026 free cash flow (8-K)
sources.snippet: Q1 2026 total liquidity ~$251M ($124.8M cash + $95.1M marketable securities); Q1 FCF -$93.3M; Q2 FCF guidance -$87M to -$92M; ~$11M raised via ATM in Q1, ~$52M in April 2026.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
sources.snippet: Ended Q1 2026 with $251M liquidity; $11M raised via ATM in quarter plus $52M in April; targets modest positive quarterly cash flow within 2027; no mention of needing additional raises for Q4 2026 flights.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Announces At-The-Market Equity Program ($300M)
sources.snippet: Up to $300M ATM program, Jefferies LLC agent, proceeds to accelerate next-gen spaceflight fleet including additional mothership.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Announces Capital Realignment Transactions Related to 2027 Convertible Notes
sources.snippet: Reduced outstanding principal to $273M from $425M; maturity extended to Dec 31, 2028.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
sources.snippet: Q1 2026 results; flight test on track Q3 2026, first spaceflight Q4 2026.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic: Cash Runway Falls Short Of Its Commercialization Timeline
sources.snippet: Analyst view that current cash runway may be insufficient for the commercialization timeline without further raises.

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Soars: SPCE Doubles—Will the Rally Last in 2026?
sources.snippet: Closed June 1, 2026 at $7.52, up 125% in five sessions, after Q1 beat and reports of a new strategic investor (unconfirmed by filings).

sources.title: Virgin Galactic Holdings, Inc. (SPCE) Stock Price and Data
